title: Compatible Rolls
description: A compatibility mod between Epic Fight and Parcool allowing for movement to work with conflicting keybinds
body:
An extremely basic and vibe coded mod that makes the roll from epic fight (while binded to R) not mess up everything while using parcool

While Epic Fights dodge roll is binded to R there are some issues with it, such as wall running and breakfall gets cooked. This mod "fixes" this by removing the ability to roll while midair as well as using a .3 second delay after breakfalling untill you can roll again.

This is the first mod I've properly made so its mainly just for personaly use. The whole mod is vibe coded as I have no idea how to code myself.

There are probaly alot of bugs with this mod but don't expect any updates to this mod as this was more just testing how to mod. I'm planning on porting this to Forge 1.20.1 but it will probaly take a long time to happen so don't expect it any time soon.

I'm considering making it so rolls can step up blocks so tell me if sounds cool.
